lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Hello, and welcome to the Crafting Guild. Accomplished crafters from all over the land come here to use our top notch workshops.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, what is that cape you're wearing? I don't recognise it.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: This? This is a Skillcape of Crafting. It is a symbol of my ability as master of the Crafting Guild and it provides unlimited teleports here.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: If you should ever achieve level 99 Crafting come and talk to me and we'll see if we can sort you out with one.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Hello, and welcome to the Crafting Guild. Accomplished crafters from all over the land come here to use our top notch workshops.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you the person I need to talk to about buying a Skillcape of Crafting?

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: I certainly am, and I can see that you are definitely talented enough to own one! The cape has a built-in teleport back to us at the guild too!

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Unfortunately, being such a prestigious item, they are appropriately expensive. I'm afraid I must ask you for 99000 gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 99000 gold! Are you mad?

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item! You can find me here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Most certainly, and free of charge!

sections.title: When trying to enter the guild without wearing a brown apron or Crafting cape

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Where's your brown apron? You can't come in here unless you're wearing one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... I haven't got one.

sections.title: When trying to enter the guild whilst wearing a brown apron or Crafting cape

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Welcome to the Guild of Master Craftsmen.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Whassup?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... are you here to give crafting tips?

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Dude, do I look like I wanna talk to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose not.

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Right on!

lines.speaker: Master Crafter
lines.text: Hello, and welcome to the Crafting Guild. Accomplished crafters from all over the land come here to use our top notch workshops.
